meta.title: The Cartographer's Paradox: Mapping a Territory That Rewrites Itself
meta.notes: Began charting at dawn. By noon the rivers had moved. The compass now points inward. Three of the four landmarks I drew yesterday deny ever existing. A villager swears the mountain to the east is, in fact, a sleeping idea — and that ideas, when properly observed, become roads. Continuing survey under protest from the terrain itself.
meta.artifact: a map that folds into a smaller map of itself

meta.title: The Cartographer's Paradox: Mapping a Territory That Rewrites Itself
meta.notes: Began charting at dawn. By noon the rivers had moved. The compass now points inward. Three of the four landmarks I drew yesterday deny ever existing. A villager swears the mountain to the east is, in fact, a sleeping idea — and that ideas, when properly observed, become roads. Continuing survey under protest from the terrain itself.

meta.title: The Cartographer's Paradox: Mapping a Territory That Rewrites Itself
meta.notes: Began charting at dawn. By noon the rivers had moved. The compass now points inward. Three of the four landmarks I drew yesterday deny ever existing. A villager swears the mountain to the east is, in fact, a sleeping idea — and that ideas, when properly observed, become roads. Continuing survey under protest from the terrain itself.

The Cartographer's Paradox — mapping a territory that rewrites itself. Began charting at dawn; by noon the rivers had moved. The compass now points inward. Three of yesterday's four landmarks deny ever existing. A villager insists the mountain to the east is a sleeping idea, and that ideas, when properly observed, become roads. Survey continues under protest from the terrain itself.

Dlaczego programista poszedł do lekarza? Bo miał null pointów życia. 💀

A na deser: Wchodzi backend do baru. Frontend pyta: „Masz rezerwację?” Backend odpowiada: „200 OK” — ale stolika nie dostał, bo zapomniał wysłaać body.
Wrapped up cleanly. All threads tied off, all tabs closed, all TODOs either done or reincarnated as future tickets. Shipping it. 🚀
